name: Werebat
read_aloud: A gaunt humanoid with leathery wings, fanged maw, and eyes that glow red in the dark.

salient_features.title: Three Forms
salient_features.text: A true werebat shifts freely between human, giant bat, and bat-humanoid hybrid. Infected werebats lose access to one form, marking them apart from the bloodline.

salient_features.title: Children of the Night
salient_features.text: Werebats roost in cave colonies of 20 to 200 common bats and a dozen giant bats, all of whom obey the family that rules them.

salient_features.title: Predators, Not Monsters
salient_features.text: Werebats see humans and demihumans as livestock rather than enemies — calm, unhurried, and patient hunters who simply place themselves higher on the food chain.

damage_immunities: Bludgeoning, Piercing, Slashing damage from nonmagical attacks that aren't silvered
senses: Blindsight 60 ft. (bat or hybrid form only)

traits.name: Shapechanger
traits.text: As a Bonus Action, the werebat shifts between Humanoid, Giant Bat, or Hybrid form. It loses its fly speed outside bat or hybrid form. It reverts to humanoid form on death.

traits.name: Echolocation
traits.text: The werebat's Blindsight is lost while it can't hear.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.text: While in sunlight, the werebat has Disadvantage on attack rolls and on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.text: The werebat makes three attacks in Hybrid form (two Claws and one Bite), or one Bite in Bat form.

actions.name: Claw (Hybrid Form Only)
actions.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Bite (Bat or Hybrid Form Only)
actions.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage. If the target is a Humanoid, it must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution save or be cursed with werebat lycanthropy.

actions.name: Blood Drain (Bat Form Only, Recharge 5-6)
actions.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12, one creature Grappled by the werebat. Failure: 10 (3d6) Necrotic damage, and the werebat regains hit points equal to the damage dealt. Success: Half damage.

source.title: TSR 02122 — AD&D Ravenloft MC10 Monstrous Compendium

conversion_notes: AD&D HD 4+2 plus flight, lycanthropy curse, and silver-only immunity → CR 3 (mirrors 5e werewolf baseline).
